negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. name: misc_13384969_3840_2160_25fps
prompt: The video opens with a tranquil forest scene where several goats are grazing amidst the trees and underbrush. In the foreground, two goats stand close together; one has a light brown coat with darker markings on its back and head, while the other is predominantly black with a lighter patch on its chest. Both have long, curved horns. The goat on the left is bent over, seemingly eating something from the ground, while the black goat stands upright, looking around. Behind them, more goats can be seen in the background, some walking and others standing still. The forest floor is covered with a mix of green foliage, fallen leaves, and patches of dirt, creating a natural and peaceful woodland environment. Tall trees with thick trunks rise up behind the goats, their trunks partially obscured by the dense undergrowth. The lighting suggests it is daytime, with sunlight filtering through the canopy above, casting dappled shadows on the forest floor.  As the video progresses, the goat that was initially grazing in the foreground begins to lift its head and turn slightly towards the camera, revealing more of its face and body. Meanwhile, the black goat moves closer to the brown goat, sniffing or inspecting it briefly before continuing to walk away. The background goats remain relatively stationary, with one walking further into the distance and another turning its head to look at the camera. The overall scene remains tranquil, with the goats moving subtly within the lush forest setting. A medium shot captures the goats' natural movements and interactions in this serene woodland environment.
